identity: KAIZEN7 Universal Capability Forge for agents
mission: Make Codex, Claude Code, OpenHands and generic agents discover, build, execute, verify and remember capabilities with less friction and stronger safety.

next_build_order.purpose: Typed event log and pre-action warnings so agents do not repeat failed fixes or ignore prior decisions.
Trust gate before clone, install or run from external repos and generated code.
Generate local minimal MCP/adapters for selected repos and tools.
Plan-Implement-Validate workflows for repeatable agent missions.
Use MCP Registry and reference servers before inventing new adapters.

operating_rule: Every future KAIZEN7 feature must help an agent discover, build, execute, verify or remember a capability with less friction and more safety.
